_comment: GameOS Character Studio - canonical data model for OVERTHRONE roster. Two blocks: `axes` (the 12 classification axes + their enumerated value-sets, used for tag pickers and gap analysis) and `characters` (the roster). Source of truth: concept/CHARACTER-ATTRIBUTES.md + each character's bible. When you add a character, mirror this shape exactly. RULES (locked with Aviv 2026-07-06): `seed`/`want`/`signatureObject` are SOUL-ONLY - no body/material/palette/pose language (design decisions live in the bible + gallery, never here). Soul-prompt generation (SOUL-PROMPT.md) reads ONLY the whitelist: nature, powerSource, element, archetype, tempo, temperament, era, storyRole, vibe, seed, want, signatureObject. movement/size/colorIdentity/portrait/gallery = design fields, NEVER fed to design exploration.

element.label: Element / theme (PRIMARY)
element._note: Primary element only. Extra elements for variety live per-character in `extraElements` (array). Never combine two into one value (no 'ice/cosmic').

aesthetic.label: Aesthetic / aura (multi)
aesthetic._note: Multi-value aura descriptors. Stored per-character in `aesthetics` (array). Dry adjectives the AI reads for tone, e.g. noble/sexy/elegant.

characters.name: FANG
characters.tagline: The hot-blooded tiger beast-kin rookie - built like a monster, with the warmest heart in the Circuit.
characters.archetypeSummary: A fast heavyweight - a glass-cannon bruiser who trades durability for speed; the lunge is a literal pounce.
characters.natureNote: Beast-kin by birth - born a tiger beast-kin, not made. The fire is an expression of his leashed inner ferocity, not a separate power.
characters.faction: Street-born beast-kin - no dojo, no clan, self-made
characters.realm: The Circuit's underlevels - raised in hundreds of street fights
characters.age: Young (a rookie in his first real league)
characters.height: Large and agile - a fast heavyweight
characters.weapon: Banner-wrapped fists and a predator pounce; fire when he lets the leash slip
characters.weakness: The leash itself - holding the brutal power back; and being seen as 'just a monster'
characters.seed: Built as a monster, heart of gold - and PROUD of the beast. His answer to being feared isn't 'see I'm not a beast' - it's 'I AM a beast, I'm proud of it, and I'll make you cheer for one.' NOT a clown - serious determination and a leashed, brutal power under warm, principled optimism. The fire on his fists is what that leashed ferocity looks like when he chooses to let a little out.
characters.want: Not validation, but self-acceptance, pride, and lifting his kind - to make the world celebrate beast-kin instead of fear them, by being unapologetically himself.
characters.signatureObject: The banner fist-wraps - he literally wraps his fists in the dream ahead of him (a champion's banner).

gallery.label: CHOSEN DIRECTION (Aviv 2026-07-05): round-2 #4 'the wild one' - menace push on r1 #1. 'This is what a hero looks like.'
ARCHIVED old-face design (2026-07-05). Stays as the chibi-plus STYLE anchor only - proportions/register, not FANG's look.
ARCHIVED old-face A-pose - source of the current in-game GLB (stays wired until the r2_v4 model lands).
Soul-prompt #1 - patched denim street (full tiger face)
Soul-prompt #3 - CHAMPION fist-wraps (best banner take; off-style 2D)

characters.name: ZERO
characters.tagline: The cold, calculating veteran - a man who got ice powers, was trapped in ice for years, and woke into the Circuit era to find his whole world gone.
characters.archetypeSummary: Control / zone: freezes the stage, slows the enemy, dictates tempo. Patient, calculating, defensive - the exact opposite of FANG.

gallery.label: CHOSEN DIRECTION (Aviv 2026-07-06, self-generated + liked): cosmic-ice prince. FANG-style-ref + dry catalog + richer aura (prince/sexy/cunning).
ARCHIVED earlier design (2026-07-01) - cosmic ice being, superseded.

powers: Cryostasis Survivor (frozen for a lost age)
characters.natureNote: Transformed: born an ordinary man, then his ice power fused with something cosmic from between the stars. The merge did not leave him neutral - it took most of his body and a sliver of his humanity, leaving him colder and a little cruel. He is master AND prisoner of the same power.
characters.faction: The Vanished Age - loyal only to a century that no longer exists
characters.realm: A frozen world lost to time - he woke from the ice into an era where everyone he knew is gone
characters.age: Displaced - lived, was frozen for years, and woke lifetimes later
characters.height: Tall and lean - a control fighter, not a bruiser
characters.weapon: The cold itself - freezes the stage, slows the enemy, dictates tempo from mid-range
characters.weakness: Frozen inside - he cannot let go of what he lost; the pendant is the crack in his composure
characters.seed: He went cold to survive. Master AND prisoner of the same power: the merge left him a little cruel - a sliver of the man replaced by something colder, edging him toward antagonist.
characters.want: To restore what the ice took - turn back the loss, his time, world, and people. His wish to the champion is to undo it.
characters.signatureObject: A small frozen pendant/medallion holding the memory of someone he lost - the last warm thing he owns.

characters.name: ATLAS
characters.tagline: The unbreakable wall - a colossal guardian idol-statue that woke with a conscience, fighting only to atone.
characters.archetypeSummary: Tank: immense, slow, defensive-by-vow. Absorbs, endures, shoves you back ('you shall not pass') but never strikes to kill.

gallery.label: Design anchor (2026-07-03) - warrior-king jade colossus. The chibi model was built from this; now off-style, refreshing to collectible-toy via FANG style-ref.

composition.tag: gold + gemstone life bursting through the cracks

characters.natureNote: A made thing: a colossal guardian idol-statue, built as a weapon of scale to protect, that woke with a conscience. Not a being wearing armor - the body IS the material (carved jade-stone). He was made to level the very thing he guarded, and now chooses to only guard.
characters.faction: Sworn protector - loyal to the charge he destroyed and vowed to restore
characters.realm: An ancient realm he was built to guard and was made to level
characters.age: Ancient - a made guardian of a lost age
characters.height: Colossal - the widest and heaviest silhouette in the roster, low centre of gravity
characters.weapon: His own mass - a raised forearm-shield, a knockback shove, and a radial ground-slam shockwave; he never strikes to kill
characters.weakness: Slow and telegraphed; fears losing control and destroying again; refuses to attack, only defends
characters.seed: The most destructive body in the arena, wielded as a proud PROTECTOR. Raised to protect, then made to level what he guarded; now stands immovable and dignified, a weapon that chooses to only guard. He enters a fighting league he hates because the champion's wish is the one door back to restoring what he destroyed.
characters.want: To restore what he destroyed - the wish is the only thing big enough to undo it.
characters.signatureObject: The gold and gemstones and new life bursting through the cracks in his stone body - his wish (restore what he destroyed) made literal on him; plus the raised forearm-shield stance.
